{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221059031E03EF0E65ABB4F21460"}"},"total":12},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7280777485326549775","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"题材新颖，脑洞也大。不一样的末世，没有空间和不断囤货，非常贴近现实生活，格局也大，推荐观看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1695189924,"group_id":"7133075766283078690","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"请各位看文的结合作者书的内容进行讨论，不要扯别的","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2kQePmGa37ulVF3b8IXGYAc+n/jpNWBsJ03y10gM1Bj","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2775598988801694","user_name":"爱吃素馄饨汤的焚莫离"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2775598988801694","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7133075766283078690","book_info":{"abstract":"【天灾+无cp+微微微恐+探索+短篇】
天灾连着人祸，地球在日复一日，年复一年中终于不堪重负，它开始反击这些不知足，不珍惜的人类。
地震，干旱，火山喷发，全球气温上升，南北极冰川融化，病毒在人类中间肆虐。
地球它开始回击了，起初没有落在自己头上时，大家都不在意，反正又不会影响自己三千块的工资，管他呢。
直到那天，全球各国一个接一个的被海啸袭击…
林聘婷带着被海水淹没的窒息感重生回到灾难前一个月。
这一次，她做好万全的准备，带着家人努力活下去。
————
她这一路遇到太多人，见识到太多的人性，她一路走走停停，她以为自己是这世界特殊的存在，后来她发现，并不是。
她理清思路，探索真相，直到真相越来越近，被一点点展露在人前。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b9f21079088ed997beff033b5c4f91ca~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"红茶小排","author_id":"","book_id":"7133075766283078690","book_name":"地球重置：带着全家在天灾求生","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":523,"name":"前世今生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=523&name=前世今生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7133240230622167593","read_count":"76","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"156201"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"95","tags":"科幻末世,重生,末世,囤物资,前世今生,天灾,无CP","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b9f21079088ed997beff033b5c4f91ca~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779332343&x-signature=hhKDf%2F7GpFNhM1gkqSXuHeoaQs0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"110723003404","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.1559788e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221059031E03EF0E65ABB4F2146
